exercises.title: Pauli Frame Tracker
exercises.description: Implement complete Pauli frame tracking through circuits.
tasks: Create frame data structure (x,z bits per qubit)
Implement frame update for X, Y, Z corrections
Propagate frame through H, S, CNOT gates
hints: H: swap x and z bits
S: z bit gets XORed with x bit
CNOT: control x spreads, target z spreads

exercises.title: QEC Cycle Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate complete QEC cycles with syndrome extraction.
tasks: Simulate d rounds of syndrome extraction
Inject random data and measurement errors
Track logical error rate over many cycles
hints: Use surface code d=3 for simplicity
Syndrome round: extract all stabilizers once
MWPM or majority vote for decoding

exercises.title: Real-Time Decoder Pipeline
exercises.description: Implement streaming decoder that processes syndromes in real-time.
tasks: Create syndrome buffer and streaming input
Update corrections as new rounds arrive
hints: Start decoding before all d rounds complete
Refine correction with each new round

exercises.title: End-to-End Protocol
exercises.description: Implement complete fault-tolerant computation for a small circuit.
tasks: Run QEC cycles before, during, and after gate
